discordIntegration.title: Discord Integration
discordIntegration.webhookUrlHelp: Create a webhook in your Discord server settings
discordIntegration.description: Configure Discord webhooks and bot notifications
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhook: How to get a webhook URL?
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: In Discord, go to Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → New Webhook. Copy the Webhook URL and paste it above. You can use different webhooks for different events, or set one general webhook for all events.

discordIntegration.title: Discord Entegrasyonu
discordIntegration.webhookUrlHelp: Discord sunucu ayarlarindan bir webhook oluşturun
discordIntegration.description: Discord webhook ve bot bildirimlerini yapilandirin
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: Discord'da Sunucu Ayarları → Entegrasyonlar → Webhook'lar → Yeni Webhook'a git. Webhook URL'sini kopyala ve yukarıya yapıştır. Farklı olaylar için farklı webhook'lar kullanabilir veya tüm olaylar için tek bir genel webhook ayarlayabilirsin.

discordIntegration.title: Discord-Integration
discordIntegration.webhookUrlHelp: Erstellen Sie einen Webhook in Ihren Discord-Servereinstellungen
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: Gehen Sie in Discord zu Servereinstellungen → Integrationen → Webhooks → Neuer Webhook. Kopieren Sie die Webhook-URL und fügen Sie sie oben ein. Sie können verschiedene Webhooks für verschiedene Ereignisse verwenden oder einen allgemeinen Webhook für alle Ereignisse festlegen.

discordIntegration.description: Configurar webhooks y notificaciones del bot de Discord
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: En Discord, ve a Configuración del servidor → Integraciones → Webhooks → Nuevo webhook. Copia la URL del webhook y pégala arriba. Puedes usar webhooks distintos para eventos distintos o un único webhook general para todos los eventos.

discordIntegration.description: Configurer les webhooks Discord et les notifications du bot
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhook: Comment obtenir une URL de webhook?
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: Dans Discord, allez dans Paramètres du serveur → Intégrations → Webhooks → Nouveau webhook. Copiez l'URL du webhook et collez-la ci-dessus. Vous pouvez utiliser des webhooks différents pour différents événements ou définir un seul webhook général pour tous les événements.

discordIntegration.title: Интеграция Discord
discordIntegration.webhookUrlHelp: Создайте вебхук в настройках вашего сервера Discord
discordIntegration.description: Настроить вебхуки Discord и уведомления бота
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: В Discord перейдите в Настройки сервера → Интеграции → Вебхуки → Новый вебхук. Скопируйте URL вебхука и вставьте его выше. Вы можете использовать разные вебхуки для разных событий или один общий вебхук для всех событий.

discordIntegration.description: Configurar webhooks e notificacoes do bot do Discord
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhook: Como obter uma URL de webhook?
discordIntegration.adm_howToGetWebhookBody: No Discord, vá em Configurações do servidor → Integrações → Webhooks → Novo webhook. Copie o URL do webhook e cole acima. Você pode usar webhooks diferentes para eventos diferentes ou definir um único webhook geral para todos os eventos.
